title: The bardiel killing
wikitext:
[]: The bardiel killing Post by tehprognoob » Sat Dec 25, 2010 7:15 pm What was the song that was playing as Unit 01 killed Bardiel in 2.0? Sounds so tragic, like another A/S theme, a Rebuild Komm Suesser Todd
